**Annual security training** — see `governance/assurance-and-training.md`.

- [ ] Security-awareness training delivered to all staff (phishing, data handling, reporting)
- [ ] Secure-coding refresher for engineers (OWASP Top 10; `/threat-model`, `/security-review`)
- [ ] Completion records captured (LMS export or roster)
- [ ] Phishing simulation run; results reviewed
- [ ] New joiners since last cycle completed onboarding training
